options.name: --watch
options.description: Run analysis continuously, watching the filesystem for changes.

options.name: --pub
options.description: Whether to run "flutter pub get" before executing this command.

options.name: --fatal-infos
options.description: Treat info level issues as fatal.

options.name: --fatal-warnings
options.description: Treat warning level issues as fatal.

subcommands.name: build
subcommands.description: Build an executable app or install bundle.

args.name: <output directory>
args.description: Directory to create the project in

options.name: --template
options.description: Specify the type of project to create [app|module|package|plugin|skeleton].

options.name: --org
options.description: The organization responsible for your new Flutter project, in reverse domain name notation.

options.name: --project-name
options.description: The project name for this new Flutter project.

options.name: --ios-language
options.description: Language to use for iOS-specific code [objc|swift].

options.name: --android-language
options.description: Language to use for Android-specific code [java|kotlin].

subcommands.name: doctor
subcommands.description: Show information about the installed tooling.

options.name: --android-licenses
options.description: Run the Android SDK manager tool to accept the SDK's licenses.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Diagnostic output.

subcommands.name: run
subcommands.description: Run your Flutter app on an attached device.

options.name: --debug
options.description: Build a debug version of your app (default).

options.name: --profile
options.description: Build a version of your app specialized for performance profiling.

options.name: --release
options.description: Build a release version of your app.

options.name: --flavor
options.description: Build a custom app flavor as defined by platform-specific build setup.

options.name: --route
options.description: Which route to load when running the app.

options.name: --target
options.description: The main entry-point file of the application.

options.name: --device-id
options.description: Target device id or name (prefixes allowed).

options.name: --all
options.description: Run on all attached devices

subcommands.name: test
subcommands.description: Run Flutter unit tests for the current project.

options.name: --name
options.description: A regular expression matching substrings of the names of tests to run.

options.name: --plain-name
options.description: A plain text string matching substrings of the names of tests to run.

options.name: --update-goldens
options.description: Whether matchesGoldenFile() calls within your test methods should update the golden files.

options.name: --coverage
options.description: Whether to collect coverage information.

globalOptions.name: --verbose
globalOptions.description: Noisy logging, including all shell commands executed.

globalOptions.name: --version
globalOptions.description: Reports the version of this tool.
